BlockedMethod: bcdedit /set {current} - blocked by Secure Boot policy
ExpectedOutcome: If WHEA storm -> 0 after reboot: DRAM page fault confirmed, hardware fix needed. If storm persists: IMC path issue.
Rollback: mountvol X: /S && bcdedit /store X:\EFI\Microsoft\Boot\BCD /deletevalue {default} truncatememory && mountvol X: /D
